rationale: Review 1's approve matches the file's stated scope (only the two Layer 0 facts; explicit (Z/2)^n later) and correctly assesses the @[simp] and lack of exposed internals as appropriate API design. Review 2's demanded aut_apply_root extraction + simp relocation is a non-material preference not required by the diff or roadmap, so acting on it yields a worse (over-refactored) PR.
